tools.name: get_regime_sample
tools.description: FREE: 24h-delayed market regime snapshot (taste of the live paid feed).

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: FREE: price list, payment network, and payTo address for all paid tools.

tools.name: get_regime_current
tools.description:
Live market regime: STABLE/VOLATILE + confidence + position_scalar ($0.005).

Validated variance detector: VOLATILE predicts ~2x forward volatility with
~90% persistence. Use for position sizing / risk gating, NOT direction.

tools.name: get_regime_history
tools.description:
Historical regime snapshots, 5-min cadence since 2026-02, 417k+ rows ($0.02).

start/end are ISO timestamps; limit <= 10000.

tools.name: estimate_execution_cost
tools.description:
Realistic execution cost in bps for an order ($0.01).

Calibrated to measured live fills (SPY/QQQ 1.5bps round-trip floor), with
square-root size impact. order_type: limit_nbbo | market.

tools.name: check_bar_quality
tools.description:
Forensic QC on YOUR OHLCV bars before you backtest on them ($0.05).

Detects impossible bars, bad prints, unadjusted splits, gaps, stale data.
bars: [{timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume}, ...] (5..100000 rows)

tools.name: audit_backtest
tools.description:
Forensic audit of a backtest trade ledger ($5.00).

Impossible-fill detection against the real tape, cost-adjusted expectancy,
overfitting checks, verdict + grade. trades_csv: CSV text with columns like
symbol, side, entry_time, exit_time, entry_price, exit_price, qty.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_regime_sample · Public sink: get_regime_current.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_regime_sample · Public sink: get_regime_current

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
